full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #45 (2026-05-28)

PULSE
Health: 0.6366 (B). 1022 wallets, 281 contributors. 73 memos today vs 85 avg. Velocity steady.

FLOW
61 reward payments, 383632 PFT distributed to 19 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (129288 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued today totaling 3,300 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,300 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (30,400 PFT, avg 6,080/day over 5 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (70 memos). Fastest new contributor: r36cMj...qmS8 (3.0 memos/day in 2 days). 14 new wallet(s) this week. 52 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.7%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-28): 152 transactions from 27 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
